title: TML+
description: Did you miss the metals in the game? This mod adds steel and titanium— which are complex metals with unique crafts and items. More metals such as chromium, iridium, and others will appear in future updates.
body:
Are there too few metals in the game? This mod adds steel and titanium! In addition to the player, this metal is also appreciated by the inhabitants, for example, gunsmiths can put a steel mace and a titanium sword in their chests, and warriors can put steel helmets. By downloading this mod, you are guaranteed to receive high-quality, beautiful and refined metals, and in the future even such specimens as chromium, iridium and others.

I wish you a successful game, with all questions and suggestions on fashion, write to me in discord:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

the_toffix

</details>
